About Duck Brothers Painting

12+ years serving Indianapolis and surrounding areas

Duck Brothers Painting started with a simple goal: to provide Indianapolis homeowners with painting services they could truly rely on. We saw too many fly-by-night operations leaving behind shoddy work and broken promises. So, we built a company on integrity, quality, and a commitment to doing things the right way.

Our approach is straightforward. We listen to your vision, provide expert guidance, and execute the project with precision. We use premium paints and proven techniques to ensure a beautiful, long-lasting finish that enhances your home's value and curb appeal. We treat every project as if it were our own home.

We're proud to be a part of the Indianapolis community. We support local organizations and strive to create a positive impact through our work. When you choose Duck Brothers Painting, you're not just hiring a painter; you're partnering with a neighbor who cares.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Duck Brothers Painting

Trusted house painter professionals serving Indianapolis, IN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
